_frame: All positions in LAR frame: +X=North, +Y=East, +Z=Nadir, origin=LAR docking interface.
_section_thruster: Hall-effect thruster — confirmed values from spec
_section_nozzle: Fixed nozzle exit direction in end-effector (EE) frame.
The EE frame Z-axis is defined along the bracket axis (wrist → thruster tip).
n̂^E = [0,0,1] means plume exits in EE +Z (along bracket outward); thrust on spacecraft is in EE -Z.
PLACEHOLDER — confirm with hardware drawings before running feasibility maps.
_section_masses: Servicer mass breakdown. servicer_dry_mass_kg + propellant_mass_0_kg = initial total servicer mass.
The StackConfig.servicer_mass (735 kg default) represents the current total; split it here.
REQUIRED — set both fields before running CompositeMassModel.
_section_cadence: Nominal station-keeping burn cadence. 5h North + 5h South = 10 hr/day.
_section_cog_positions: CoG and tank positions in LAR frame [m].
null → auto-computed from StackConfig geometry (geometric bus centre as proxy).
Fill in once confirmed with structural model.
_section_constraints: Feasibility filter thresholds — adjust based on mission requirements.
_section_grid: Joint-space grid resolution [N_q0, N_q1, N_q2]. 50^3 = 125k cells.
_section_epochs: Mission epochs to evaluate [days from BOL].
Default: BOL + four evenly-spaced samples through EOL (1825 days = 5 yr mission).
Add intermediate epochs where CoG migration rate is high (near BOL for fresh propellant).
